metadata.reference: Lahiri Ayanamsa projection & Swiss Ephemeris Standard
metadata.provenance: Direct calculation from geographical coordinate coordinates paired with UTC Julian day progression
metadata.source: JHora Engine with local trigonometric corrections

metadata.calculation_standard: Parashari Vedic Astrology (Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra)

provenance.ascendant: Calculated client-side using coordinate geographical projection
provenance.planets: Directly mapped from JHora RAW API planetary longitude data
provenance.divisional_charts: Derived client-side using standard harmonic multiplier modular equations (rashi * harmonic_division % 360) on natal coordinates to retain sub-degree precision of planet, sign, nakshatra, and house placements

metadata.source: Hybrid (JHora Raw Payload + client-side deterministic divisional charts calculation)

yogas.name: Vesai Yoga
yogas.description: You will have a balanced outlook. You are truthful, tall and sluggish. You will be happy and comfortable even with little wealth.

yogas.name: Vosi Yoga
yogas.description: You will be skillful, charitable, famous, learned and strong.

yogas.name: Ubhayachara Yoga
yogas.description: You will have all comforts. You will be like a king or an equal

yogas.name: Sunaphaa Yoga
yogas.description: You will become a king or an equal. You are intelligent, wealthy and famous. You will have self-earned wealth.

yogas.name: Anaphaa Yoga
yogas.description: You will become a king with good looks. Your body is likely free from disease. You are a person of character and have great reputation. You are surrounded by comforts.

yogas.name: Duradhara Yoga
yogas.description: You will enjoy many pleasures. You are charitable. You will wealth and vehicles. You will have good servants.

yogas.name: Sarpa Yoga
yogas.description: One born with this yoga is miserable, unhappy, cruel, poor and dependent on others for food. This is a very bad combination.

yogas.name: Veenaa Yoga
yogas.description: One born with this yoga likes music, dance and songs. This person has many servants. This person is wealthy, skillful and a leader of men. Veenaa is a stringed musical instrument. This is also called Vallaki yoga by some authors.

yogas.name: Asubha Yoga
yogas.description: One born with this yoga has many desires and is sinful and enjoys the wealth of others.

yogas.name: Amala Yoga
yogas.description: One born with this yoga has ever-lasting fame. The person is respected by kings. Person has luxuries and is virtuous. Person helps others. Amala means pure. Because the 10th house shows one's' conduct in society, situation of only benefics there makes one’s conduct in the society very pure.

yogas.name: Saraswathi Yoga
yogas.description: One born with this yoga is very learned, skillful, intelligent, rich and famous. Person is praised by all. Saraswathi is the goddess of learning.

yogas.name: Chatussagara Yoga
yogas.description: You will earn great reputation, be equal to a king, and possess good health and a long life.

yogas.name: Vallaki Yoga
yogas.description: You will be fond of music, fine arts, and literature. You will be happy, famous, and possess many friends.

yogas.name: Dharidhra Yoga
yogas.description: You may face financial struggles, heavy debts, and difficulty in accumulating wealth despite hard work.

yogas.name: Dharidhra Yoga
yogas.description: Yoga causes dire poverty, financial straits, wretchedness and miseries

yogas.name: Dharidhra Yoga
yogas.description: Yoga causes dire poverty, financial straits, wretchedness and miseries

yogas.name: Rogagrastha Yoga
yogas.description: You may have a weak constitution and be prone to chronic health issues or frequent illnesses.

yogas.name: Krisanga Yoga
yogas.description: You will have a lean, thin, or emaciated physical appearance.

yogas.name: Dehasthoulya Yoga
yogas.description: You will have a stout, heavy, or corpulent body (tendency toward obesity).

yogas.name: Dehasthoulya Yoga
yogas.description: You will have a stout, heavy, or corpulent body (tendency toward obesity).

yogas.name: Sada Sanchara Yoga
yogas.description: You will be constantly on the move, traveling frequently for work or personal reasons.

yogas.name: Swaveeryaddhana Yoga
yogas.description: You will earn wealth solely through your own efforts, hard work, and personal prowess, without much ancestral help.

yogas.name: Bhratruvriddhi Yoga
yogas.description: You will have an increase in the number of brothers and sisters, and enjoy a harmonious relationship with them.

yogas.name: Bandhu Pujya Yoga
yogas.description: The person will be respected by his relatives and friends.

yogas.name: Bandhu Bhisthyaktha Yoga
yogas.description: The person will be clesertedby his relatives.

yogas.name: Maathru Naasa yoga
yogas.description: The person's mother will have a very early death.

yogas.name: Kapata Yoga
yogas.description: The person becomes a hypocrite.

yogas.name: Nishkapata Yoga
yogas.description: The person will be pure-hearted and hates secrecy and hypocrisy.

yogas.name: Maathru Sneha Yoga
yogas.description: Cordial relations will prevail between mother and son.

yogas.name: Kaalanirdesat Puthranaasa Yoga
yogas.description: The person will suffer loss of children in his 32nd and 40th years respectively.

yogas.name: Sathkalatra Yoga
yogas.description: The native's wife will be noble and virtuous.

metadata.reference: KP Reader 1-6 standards (Vimshottari 120-year division of Nakshatras into Sub & Sub-Sub lords)

provenance.cusps: Computed client-side using standard Placidus projection based on geographic coordinate inputs
provenance.planets: Derived client-side via exact mathematical subdivisions of 360-degree stellar ranges to resolve star, sub, and sub-sub lords
provenance.house_significators: Extracted directly from JHora raw API payload
provenance.planet_significators: Extracted directly from JHora raw API payload

metadata.source: Hybrid (JHora significators + Client-side stellar subdivision algorithms)

metadata.reference: Sage Jaimini BPHS & Jaimini Sutra Chapters

provenance.karakas: Determined via highest degree sort of 7 standard planets from Sun to Saturn
provenance.karakamsha: Calculated client-side as Navamsha sign of Atmakaraka
provenance.swamsha: Set identical to Karakamsha as natal Navamsha Lagna / Atmakaraka Navamsha coordinate
provenance.arudha: Calculated client-side as standard Arudha Padas A1-A12 using house lord distance metrics
provenance.argala: Computed client-side based on planetary placements in 2nd, 4th, 11th houses relative to each rashi
provenance.chara_dasha: Computed client-side direct/reverse dasha sequences based on odd/even rashi configurations

metadata.source: Computed Client-side (from raw JHora planetary coordinates)

provenance.planets: Calculated client-side using standard Tropical offset from sidereal positions
provenance.cusps: Standard equal house divisions from the tropical ascendant
provenance.aspects: Computed client-side via angle differences between tropical coordinates (conjunction, sextile, square, trine, opposition)

solar_return_2026.description: Solar Return Chart for year 2026 manifests deep Leo ascendant with Sun in H5.

metadata.provenance: Planet-to-planet combinations and aspects analyzed dynamically based on mutual placements

nandi_nadi_placements.Jupiter-Saturn: Jiva-Karma connection. Indicates structured, highly ethical soul path focusing on spiritual organization and computational craftsmanship.
nandi_nadi_placements.Venus-Mercury: Indicates high artistic intelligence, financial strategy, and refined speech.
nandi_nadi_placements.Mars-Rahu: Angarak connection. Bestows immense mechanical, technological, or real-estate expansion potential.

metadata.provenance: Standardized planetary placement translation assuming Aries as permanent House 1

remedies.Sun: Offer water to the rising Sun daily in a copper vessel; maintain good character.
remedies.Moon: Keep a silver coin in your wallet; serve your mother and elderly women.
remedies.Mars: Feed sweet bread (tandoori roti) to dogs; avoid anger and disputes.
remedies.Mercury: Donate green grass to cows; wear green copper coin or ring.
remedies.Jupiter: Apply saffron tilak on your forehead; respect gurus and teachers.
remedies.Venus: Donate ghee, curd, or camphor; maintain personal hygiene and clean clothing.
remedies.Saturn: Feed crows with mustard oil-coated chapatis; help laborers and servants.
